July 19th 2026
I officially started my summer job as a production assistant for Early Music Vancouver (EMV) today, met the cast of Orfeo.

I mainly was in charge of providing refreshments, though I will have more duties later on.

I tried to watch the World Cup final during my lunch break but the only place on UBC to watch it was fully booked, so I ultimately had to rely on iShowSpeed's livestream to get a picture of the mattch (though I did manage to see Spain's winning goal)
